nodes.label: SharedGameData Directory
nodes.rationale: Shared data folder between MapEditor and Ester. Contains Tiles/ (PNG sprites organized by stable ID), Maps/ (JSON maps exported by editor), and Licenses/. Editor writes here during development; the game reads/copies as source of truth.

nodes.label: Mossy Terrain Tileset
nodes.rationale: 256x256 terrain tiles sliced from Mossy - TileSet.png. Includes manifest.json, contact-sheet.png, autotile-preview.png. Composite tiles (mossy-terrain-auto-*) fill connection masks missing from the original pack using recuts from Mossy - FloatingPlatforms.png.
